overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing a character riding a mechanical Sunwing mount through a heavy rainstorm. The journey traverses misty wetlands, dense forest canopy, open ocean waves, and ancient stone island ruins before departing over the sea.

agents.ego_description: piloting a mechanical sunwing over misty wetlands, gliding between rain showers and scattered trees

entered.detail: shallow greenish water covered in mist and fog
tall evergreen trees surrounding the wetland area
dark grey storm clouds covering the sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of a character riding a mechanical flying creature over a misty wetland. Heavy rain falls over the shallow green waters, surrounded by tall pine trees and dense vegetation. The atmosphere is stormy with low visibility due to fog and precipitation.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest with tall tree canopy

events.description: UI notification 'Discovered CAMPFIRE' appears briefly on screen

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through dense tree trunks, banking sharply left and right to avoid collision

entered.detail: thick overhead tree cover blocking the sky
ground covered in dirt and undergrowth visible between trees

segments.scene_description: The creature flies into a dense forest area, navigating between closely spaced tree trunks. The canopy overhead blocks most of the sky, creating a darker, enclosed environment. A game UI element appears indicating a campfire discovery as the rider maneuvers through the trees.

events.description: exits forest canopy and emerges over open coastal waters

agents.ego_description: flying low over choppy ocean waves, maintaining steady course over the dark water

entered.detail: vast expanse of dark choppy water under stormy skies
foggy shoreline visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Breaking free from the forest, the scene opens into a vast ocean expanse. The camera flies low over dark, choppy waves with heavy rain continuing to fall. The horizon shows distant foggy coastlines while the sky remains completely overcast.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone ruins on rocky island

events.description: slows down and banks sharply to circle the island ruins

agents.ego_description: circling the island ruins, observing the ancient stone structures and preparing to land

entered.detail: ancient stone structures and broken pillars on a small rocky island
tall crumbling stone columns covered in moss
green trees and plants growing on the rocky island

segments.scene_description: Approaching a small rocky island, the creature slows down and begins circling ancient stone ruins. The island features crumbling pillars and tropical vegetation growing among the rocks. Other flying creatures can be seen in the distance as the rain continues to fall.

events.description: takes off from island and accelerates over open water

agents.ego_description: departing the island, flying low over waves away from the ruins toward open sea

entered.detail: fog-covered mountains visible on the distant horizon

segments.scene_description: The creature takes off from the island and accelerates over the open ocean, leaving the ruins behind. The camera follows as it flies low over the waves, with distant mountains barely visible through the mist and rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous flight through a stormy landscape that transitions from misty wetlands into a dense forest before opening onto a vast, choppy ocean. It begins with a view of a character riding a mechanical creature over shallow green waters and tall pine trees, where heavy rain and thick fog limit visibility. As the rider maneuvers forward, the scene shifts into a darker, enclosed environment, weaving between closely spaced tree trunks beneath a heavy forest canopy. The camera then breaks free from the trees, expanding into a wide expanse of dark, turbulent waves under a completely overcast sky. Finally, the flight continues low over the water toward distant, foggy coastlines as the rain persists.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a slow exploration of ancient island ruins to a high-speed flight across a stormy ocean. It begins with the creature circling a small rocky island, gliding past crumbling stone pillars and tropical vegetation while other flying creatures drift through the falling rain. As the creature takes off, the scene shifts from the enclosed ruins to the vastness of the open sea, leaving the island behind. The camera then accelerates low over the churning waves, where the landscape opens up to reveal distant mountains barely visible through the thick mist and rain.
